// about me

People, operations,
and AI.

I'm a fourth-year Industrial and Information Management student at National Cheng Kung University in Tainan, originally from Indonesia — and, above all, an AI enthusiast who loves exploring new things. Whether it's a new tool, an automation idea, or a side project, I like to dive in and figure out how it works.

Most of my work has been about getting things done with people — coordinating teams and organizing large-scale events. Last year I served as Event Chairman of Indonesian Cultural Day at NCKU, leading 180+ people across 18 divisions over 7 months, from budget and sponsors to stage production and marketing.

Lately I've been channeling that same curiosity into tech — building AI-powered automations, finance tools, and workflow bots, while sharpening my skills in data analytics and Power BI. I'm trilingual in English, Mandarin, and Indonesian, graduating June 2026 and excited about roles where I can mix operations with AI and new technology.
